# miniz (vendored)

Single-file public-domain DEFLATE/zlib library, used for gzip response
compression (M14). Source: https://github.com/richgel999/miniz (release 3.0.2
amalgamation, miniz.c + miniz.h). Unlicense (public domain). Compiled with
relaxed warnings (it is third-party); only the core/test binaries link it.
